summary: I bring 10 years of experience as an iOS Engineer, demonstrating proficiency in writing clean code & applying OOP principles. I possess a track record of successfully delivering multiple apps to large user bases, overseeing their distribution & integrity during development & production. I have consistently built strong relationships with colleagues at every workplace and have been a reliable and valued team member.
interests: I am highly active in hackathons and enthusiastic about participating in tech meetups, representing companies I work for. I look forward to sharing my passion for innovation and technology in such events.
